overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a rural landscape. The character passes through a stone gate and travels through grassy fields under stormy overcast skies, eventually catching up to and passing another traveler on the road before continuing into rockier terrain.

events.description: passing through the stone gate from enclosed entrance to open countryside

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the stone gate into the open meadow

entered.detail: large stone archway with wooden beams marking the entrance to the path
low stone wall flanking the left side of the gate
low stone wall flanking the right side of the gate
winding dirt trail leading through the countryside
tall green grass covering the open fields on both sides of the path
dense forest lining the edges of the meadow

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a stone gate entrance where Geralt walks through an archway into the open countryside. The camera follows from behind as the character transitions from the semi-covered gate area into a wide meadow with dirt paths and forest edges.

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the dirt path through the grassy meadow, heading toward the distant tree line

entered.detail: individual oak trees dotting the meadow landscape
dense forest visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the winding dirt path through open meadows with scattered trees. The stone gate falls behind as the landscape opens up to reveal distant forests under the stormy sky.

events.description: fellow traveler becomes visible walking ahead on the path in the distance
Geralt overtakes the traveler on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking faster to catch up to and pass the fellow traveler on the road

notable_agents.action: traveler wearing a hat and carrying a large backpack walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: crumbling stone wall fragment alongside the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the path, a fellow traveler appears in the distance walking in the same direction. Geralt catches up and passes the traveler near a crumbling stone wall ruin on the right side of the path.

events.description: terrain becomes rockier with large stone outcrops appearing on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding path as the landscape becomes more rugged and rocky

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation alongside the path
leafless dead tree standing beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The path winds through increasingly rugged terrain with rocky outcrops on the left and a prominent dead tree. The meadow continues on both sides as Geralt progresses deeper into the countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone entrance into an expansive, rugged countryside under a stormy sky. It begins as Geralt passes through a stone archway, transitioning from the semi-covered gate into a wide meadow bordered by forest edges. As the camera follows him along a winding dirt path, the landscape opens further to reveal distant woodlands and scattered trees. The scene then shifts as Geralt catches up to and passes a fellow traveler near the ruins of a crumbling stone wall on the right. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rugged, moving past rocky outcrops and a prominent dead tree as the path leads deeper into the wild countryside.
